expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: Multiple horizontal sections appear clipped on the right side of the viewport. The top category row cuts off the “Hot Games” tab, and the game rows show partially visible cards on the right edge.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, hiding part of the lower game cards.
The hero carousel content and right-side arrow are partially cut off at the right edge, making the banner feel cropped or misaligned.
The selected “Home” category pill has an odd blue/orange shadow or gradient smear underneath it, which looks like a rendering or overflow artifact.
Some game card overlays, such as jackpot amounts and info icons, are close to the card edges and appear cramped, especially on clipped cards.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue mentions a misspelling of 'Jackpots' as 'Jacpots' or any text spelling error; all reported issues concern layout and styling problems.
